screen.zeconomy.bank.title: Z Bank

screen.zeconomy.exchange.title: Exchange Setup
message.zeconomy.atm.disabled: ATM: physical money is disabled in config
message.zeconomy.mailbox.empty_hand: Hold the item stack you want to send in your main hand
message.zeconomy.mailbox.self_send: You cannot send mail to yourself
message.zeconomy.help.line.balance: /zeco balance [player] - wallet, bank, vault and mail summary
message.zeconomy.help.line.exchange: /zeco exchange <from> <to> [amount] | rates - view or convert currency
message.zeconomy.help.line.exchange_admi: /zeco exchange audit | ratepair | rateclear | resetrates - maintain exchange rates (admin)
message.zeconomy.help.line.mail: /zeco mail send <player> | claim - send held stack or claim mailbox
message.zeconomy.help.line.status: /zeco status - config, storage and bridge summary
message.zeconomy.help.line.admin_currenc: /zeco admin currency create|delete - manage runtime currencies (admin)
/zeco admin currency lock|unlock <player> <id> - toggle player access to a currency (admin)
/zeco admin currency lockall|unlockall <id> - toggle currency access for all known players (admin)
/zeco admin currency inspect <player> - inspect a player's currency entries (admin)
/zeco admin currency players <id> - list players and lock-state for one currency (admin)
/zeco admin currency repair <player> - repair a player's currency entries (admin)
/zeco admin currency issues - list players with missing or dangling currency entries (admin)
/zeco admin currency summary - show per-currency coverage and lock summary (admin)
/zeco admin currency repairissues - repair only players with missing or dangling entries (admin)
/zeco admin currency audit|repairall - inspect or repair player currency entries (admin)
message.zeconomy.help.line.admin_status: /zeco admin status - storage, vault bridge and runtime diagnostics (admin)
message.zeconomy.help.line.admin_save: /zeco admin save - flush all economy data to storage now (admin)
message.zeconomy.help.line.admin_backup: /zeco admin backup - create a timestamped backup of current storage files (admin)
message.zeconomy.help.line.admin_reloads: /zeco admin reloadstorage - reload economy state from backend and resync online players (admin)
message.zeconomy.help.line.admin_exportn: /zeco admin exportnow - write economy_export.json right now (admin)
message.zeconomy.help.line.admin_exports: /zeco admin exportstatus - inspect export file path, size and freshness (admin)
message.zeconomy.help.line.admin_doctor: /zeco admin doctor - quick health check for currencies, files and vault bridge (admin)
message.zeconomy.help.line.admin_doctorf: /zeco admin doctorfix <player> - reconcile and try vault repair for a player (admin)
/zeco admin doctorfixall - reconcile and try vault repair for all online players (admin)
message.zeconomy.help.line.admin_inspect: /zeco admin inspect <player> - inspect wallet, bank, vault and mirror state (admin)
message.zeconomy.help.line.admin_reconci: /zeco admin reconcile <player> - rebuild player mirror and sync state (admin)
message.zeconomy.help.line.admin_syncvau: /zeco admin syncvault <player> - force pull Vault balance now (admin)
